name: Photoview
description: Photoview — self-hosted personal photo library: scans a read-only media folder into a timeline + albums, with EXIF, map (optional Mapbox token), face recognition, RAW + video. SQLite backend (single container). Serves the personal 'Fotos' library from the vault pool read-only at /photos; point the init page at /photos. Optional MAPBOX_TOKEN injected via host user-config app.env (never committed).
author: viktorstrate
